Piri Reis

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Piri Reis Map
by Piri Reis
Ottoman · Piri Reis · 1513
Surviving fragment of a world map drawn by the Ottoman admiral Piri Reis — the Atlantic coast of the New World only two decades after Columbus, drawn from prize charts captured in naval battle.
←Bill Reid Possibly by Hans Reischperger→
